channel.title: DCS on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in DCS on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: DCS - Horizontally Scalable Cron for Cloud DCS is a Cloud-Native Job Scheduling System that effortlessly scales with your business.

item.title: Use
item.description: Define a Job Just define a job via CR. The job will reliably run as expected. Let’s start with the simplest example.

item.title: Features
item.description: Function Define a Job apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: CronJob metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: expr: ... # schedule expression callback: .

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Pricing and Licensing Category Feature DCS Pro DCS Enterprise Audience Small Business Medium to Large Companies Function Cron Job ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone ✅ ✅ Function Periodic Job ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback with Header and/or Body ✅ ✅ Function TCP Callback ✅ ✅ Reliability Callback with Retry - ✅ Reliability Callback with Timeout - ✅ Function Time Zone Change - ✅ Function Job History - ✅ Function Limit Schedule Times - ✅ Scalability Vertical Scaling ✅ ✅ Scalability Horizontal Scaling - ✅ Reliability Architecture Active-Standby Truly Distributed,

item.title: RESTful
item.description: Create/Update a Job Request Method: PUT URL: https://<host:port>/jobs/<namespace>/<name> Header: Content-Type: application/json Body: As follows are all fields including optional ones.

item.title: Release History
item.description: v1.1.0 2024-06-25 Category Feature Pro Enterprise API RESTful ✅ ✅ v1.0.0 2024-05-27 Category Feature Pro Enterprise API CR ✅ ✅ Function Cron Job ✅ ✅ Function Periodic Job ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback with Header and/or Body ✅ ✅ Function TCP Callback ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone Change - ✅ Function Job History - ✅ Function Limit Schedule Times - ✅ Scalability Vertical Scaling ✅ ✅ Scalability Horizontal Scaling - ✅ Reliability Architecture Active-Standby Truly Distributed, Load-Balancing Reliability Callback with Retry - ✅ Reliability Callback with Timeout - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Time Zone Changes - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash - ✅ Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation ✅ ✅ Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade from Pro - ✅

item.title: Pro Installation
item.description: Prerequisite Cert Manager DCS RESTful server depends on cert-manager ↗ to issue certificates. You’ve probably been using cert-manager. If so, you can skip this section.

item.title: Enterprise Installation
item.description: Prerequisite Cert Manager DCS RESTful server depends on cert-manager ↗ to issue certificates. You’ve probably been using cert-manager. If so, you can skip this section.
